plugins.name: wezterm-dev
plugins.description: WezTerm terminal configuration and customization for Claude Code workflows. Includes tmux-style keybindings, visual effects (opacity, blur, themes), custom tab bars with Nerd Font icons, and Agent Deck for monitoring Claude Code agents

plugins.name: hyper-dev
plugins.description: Hyper terminal configuration and plugin development for Claude Code workflows. Covers keybindings, visual customization, theme creation, plugin discovery, and building Hyper plugins with the Electron/React API

plugins.name: prisma-dev
plugins.description: Prisma ORM development workflows with schema analysis, migration safety, and query guidance

plugins.name: shadcn-dev
plugins.description: shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS v4 development workflows for React applications. Covers component usage, form building with react-hook-form and zod, theming, data tables with TanStack Table, and Tailwind CSS v4 migration

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Deterministic code quality infrastructure — git hooks, lint-staged, and formatters that run on every commit and push, with guided setup and ecosystem detection

plugins.name: claude-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Documentation and conventions for building Claude Code plugins with guided workflows, AI-assisted agent creation, and dynamic documentation caching

plugins.name: opentui-dev
plugins.description: OpenTUI terminal interface development with TypeScript/Bun. Supports Core imperative API, React reconciler, and Solid reconciler with components, flexbox layout, keyboard handling, and animations

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Development workflow validation and planning tools. Integrates a validation checklist into plan mode and provides a gut-check agent that reviews implementation plans before coding begins

plugins.name: tabby-dev
plugins.description: Tabby terminal configuration, SSH connections, and plugin development for Claude Code workflows. Covers visual customization, multi-chord hotkeys, SSH/serial/telnet connection profiles, and plugin discovery and development

plugins.name: agent-teams
plugins.description: Agent team blueprints, coordination patterns, and reusable personas for parallel development. Unified commands (spawn-build, spawn-think, spawn-create) with adaptive sizing and verbosity control

plugins.name: gemini-cli
plugins.description: Gemini CLI integration for large context review, batch processing, and image generation via nano-banana extension. Advisory-only with --sandbox enforcement, configurable timeouts, retry logic, and output validation

plugins.name: session-insights
plugins.description: Interactive session analysis, deep drill-down into Claude Code conversation history, and workflow improvement generation with programmatic JSONL parsing

plugins.name: obsidian-dev
plugins.description: Obsidian plugin development workflows covering setup, the Plugin API, commands, settings, vault operations, UI components, and editor integration

plugins.name: repo-sme
plugins.description: Repository Subject Matter Expert — register GitHub repos, browse branches, query architecture and APIs, and create GitHub issues via read-only analysis

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: Project manager for multi-project workflows — per-repo GitHub credentials, Linear issue lifecycle, branch naming, PR linking, and session briefings

plugins.name: resend-cli
plugins.description: Resend CLI integration for sending emails, managing domains, contacts, broadcasts, templates, webhooks, API keys, and segments from the terminal
